title: Conjecture 1.1 (Neumann-Lara)
context_text: Proposed by Neumann-Lara in 1985 (and independently by Škrekovski), this conjecture asserts that the vertices of any oriented planar graph can be 2-coloured without creating any monochromatic directed cycle. There is a lack of methods to attack it and only sporadic partial results are known.
paper_contribution: Proves a relaxed version: every planar digraph of digirth at least 4 is 2-colourable (the previously known result required digirth at least 5).
paper_title: Planar digraphs of digirth four are 2-colourable
